test.name: Création Utilisateur - Email Vide

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Expect Error
Create User
Evaluate
kw.msg: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': 'john_doe', 'email': '', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb65acdce9f693463c78'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'email', 'description': "L'email est requis et doit être valide", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'pattern', 'specifiedAs': {'pattern': '^.+@.+\\..+$'}, 'reason': 'regular expression did not match', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.
kw.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': 'john_doe', 'email': '', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb65acdce9f693463c78'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'email', 'description': "L'email est requis et doit être valide", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'pattern', 'specifiedAs': {'pattern': '^.+@.+\\..+$'}, 'reason': 'regular expression did not match', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}

kw.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': 'john_doe', 'email': '', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb65acdce9f693463c78'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'email', 'description': "L'email est requis et doit être valide", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'pattern', 'specifiedAs': {'pattern': '^.+@.+\\..+$'}, 'reason': 'regular expression did not match', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}

kw.doc: Runs the keyword and checks that the expected error occurred.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.msg: 'Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': 'john_doe', 'email': '', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb65acdce9f693463c78'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'email', 'description': "L'email est requis et doit être valide", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'pattern', 'specifiedAs': {'pattern': '^.+@.+\\..+$'}, 'reason': 'regular expression did not match', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}' does not contain 'ValidationError'
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
kw.status: 'Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': 'john_doe', 'email': '', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb65acdce9f693463c78'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'email', 'description': "L'email est requis et doit être valide", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'pattern', 'specifiedAs': {'pattern': '^.+@.+\\..+$'}, 'reason': 'regular expression did not match', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}' does not contain 'ValidationError'

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Vérifie que le système rejette la création d'un utilisateur sans email conformément au schéma de validation
test.status: 'Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': 'john_doe', 'email': '', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb65acdce9f693463c78'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'email', 'description': "L'email est requis et doit être valide", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'pattern', 'specifiedAs': {'pattern': '^.+@.+\\..+$'}, 'reason': 'regular expression did not match', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}' does not contain 'ValidationError'

Evaluate
kw.msg: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': '', 'email': 'valid@email.com', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb67acdce9f693463c7a'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'username', 'description': "Le nom d'utilisateur est requis", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'minLength', 'specifiedAs': {'minLength': 3}, 'reason': 'specified string length was not satisfied', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.
kw.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').insert_one({'username': '', 'email': 'valid@email.com', 'password': 'secret123', 'phone': '1234567890', 'name': {'firstname': 'John', 'lastname': 'Doe'}, 'id': 123})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688deb67acdce9f693463c7a'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'username', 'description': "Le nom d'utilisateur est requis", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'minLength', 'specifiedAs': {'minLength': 3}, 'reason': 'specified string length was not satisfied', 'consideredValue': ''}]}]}]}}}

kw.msg: Evaluating expression '__import__(\'pymongo\').MongoClient(\'mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net\').get_database(\'label1DB\').get_collection(\'users\').find_one({"id": abc})' failed: InvalidDocument: Invalid document {'find': 'users', 'filter': {'id': <module 'abc' (frozen)>}, 'limit': 1, 'singleBatch': True, 'lsid': {'id': Binary(b'\x1d\xf8{Q\xc0\x80F?\xa3`\xff\x17|\x11\x90\xab', 4)}, '$clusterTime': {'clusterTime': Timestamp(1754131312, 10), 'signature': {'hash': b'\x90\xb5\xc5\x9e\x1b"l\x0c\x95\x05Z\xaa\x18\xb6C\xd9{TI\x0c', 'keyId': 7473336557823328259}}, '$db': 'label1DB'} | cannot encode object: <module 'abc' (frozen)>, of type: <class 'module'>

kw.name: Update User
Evaluate
kw.msg: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').update_one({'_id': __import__('bson').ObjectId('00000000000000')}, {'$set': {'username': 'senior_invalid_test', 'email': 'senior_invalid@test.com', 'senior': True}})" failed: InvalidId: '00000000000000' is not a valid ObjectId, it must be a 12-byte input or a 24-character hex string
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.
kw.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').update_one({'_id': __import__('bson').ObjectId('00000000000000')}, {'$set': {'username': 'senior_invalid_test', 'email': 'senior_invalid@test.com', 'senior': True}})" failed: InvalidId: '00000000000000' is not a valid ObjectId, it must be a 12-byte input or a 24-character hex string

Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').update_one({'_id': __import__('bson').ObjectId('00000000000000')}, {'$set': {'username': 'senior_invalid_test', 'email': 'senior_invalid@test.com', 'senior': True}})" failed: InvalidId: '00000000000000' is not a valid ObjectId, it must be a 12-byte input or a 24-character hex string

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=ERREUR: Un ID senior invalide a été accepté!
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=ERREUR: Modification effectuée avec un ID senior invalide!
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=ERREUR: Utilisateur créé avec ID senior invalide!
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Vérifie le rejet des IDs seniors invalides
test.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('users').update_one({'_id': __import__('bson').ObjectId('00000000000000')}, {'$set': {'username': 'senior_invalid_test', 'email': 'senior_invalid@test.com', 'senior': True}})" failed: InvalidId: '00000000000000' is not a valid ObjectId, it must be a 12-byte input or a 24-character hex string

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Fail
kw.msg: ❌ ERREUR: Le système devrait rejeter la suppression d'un ID inexistant!
kw.arg: ❌ ERREUR: Le système devrait rejeter la suppression d'un ID inexistant!
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: ❌ ERREUR: Le système devrait rejeter la suppression d'un ID inexistant!

kw.arg: ❌ ERREUR: Le système devrait rejeter la suppression d'un ID inexistant!
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
kw.status: ❌ ERREUR: Le système devrait rejeter la suppression d'un ID inexistant!

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: ❌ ERREUR CRITIQUE: L'utilisateur a été créé lors de la suppression!
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

Evaluate

test.status: Evaluating expression '__import__(\'pymongo\').MongoClient(\'mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net\').get_database(\'label1DB\').get_collection(\'users\').delete_one({"_id": __import__(\'bson\').ObjectId("abcccvv")})' failed: InvalidId: 'abcccvv' is not a valid ObjectId, it must be a 12-byte input or a 24-character hex string
